title: Surviving the BOC Red Lane: Customs Selectivity Explained
summary: Demystifying the Bureau of Customs channel selectivity system. Learn why shipments get flagged for physical inspection and how to expedite your release.

title: FDA Food Guide: Navigating LTO vs CPR Requirements
summary: A comprehensive breakdown of securing your License to Operate (LTO) before applying for a Certificate of Product Registration (CPR) for imported food products.

title: FDA Cosmetics: Notification Rules for Lipsticks and Perfumes
summary: Step-by-step compliance checklist for cosmetic notifications, chemical restrictions, and calculating import duties on luxury beauty shipments.

title: BPI Regulations: Securing SPS Clearance for Fruits and Vegetables
summary: Don't risk cargo destruction. How to correctly apply for the Sanitary and Phytosanitary Import Clearance (SPSIC) before fresh produce departs the port of origin.
author: TradExpress.co

title: DTI/BPS Compliance: Mandatory PS Mark and ICC 73 Product Lists
summary: A definitive guide to critical products requiring Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) and Philippine Standard (PS) safety certifications—featuring steel, cement, and electrical devices.
author: TradExpress.co

title: NTC Type Approval: Importing Routers, Drones, and Smart Devices
summary: Avoid seizure at customs. Step-by-step walkthrough for filing NTC permits, type certificates, and coordinating with CAAP for commercial drone imports.

title: Port Logistics: Spotting and Avoiding Hidden Port Charges
summary: Break down the true costs of shipping. How to budget for Arrastre, Wharfage, and establish strategies to completely bypass demurrage and detention fees.
